name: De Luxe Rennet Custard
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Canned jellied cranberry sauce, and few drops red food color. Or
recipeInstructions:
Choose your favorite rennet-custard flavor. Make as package directs, but substitute light cream for milk. Just before serving, top with one of these:
Toasted coconut
Partially thawed frozen orange sections or fresh raspberries or canned apricot nectar strawberries
Chopped walnuts
Canned pineapple tidbits
Chocolate-Almond. Add 1/4 teaspoon almond extract to chocolate rennet.
Rum-Mocha. Add 1/4 teaspoon rum extract and 1 teaspoon instant-coffee powder to chocolate rennet.
Trifle. Sprinkle cake slices with rum, sherry, or brandy extract. Pour vanilla or lemon rennet-custard dessert over slices.
Cranberry or Prune Island. Beat 1 egg white until stiff but not dry. Gradually beat in 2 tablespoons granulated sugar. Fold in 1 teaspoon lemon juice, substitute 1/2 cup canned strained prunes (baby pack) for canned jellied cranberry sauce and red food color. Divide meringue among 5 sherbet glasses. Pour on vanilla rennet.
Sherry-Maple. Add 1 teaspoon sherry extract to maple rennet.
Orange-Mincemeat. Place spoonful of prepared mincemeat in each serving dish. Pour on orange rennet.
